name: Naming
description: Conventions for naming workflows, variables, arguments, and annotations.

name: Workflow Design
description: Structural and design rules applying to individual workflow files.

name: Reliability
description: Error handling, fault tolerance, and retry patterns.

name: Logging
description: Presence, level, and content of log message activities.

name: Security
description: Detection of hardcoded credentials, sensitive data exposure, and unsafe patterns.

name: Dependencies
description: Package reference hygiene, restricted or required activity packages.

name: Pipeline
description: Project-level pipeline structure: stages, entry points, and lifecycle annotations.

name: Configuration
description: Project settings, properties, and runtime configuration correctness.

name: Documentation
description: Presence and content of workflow annotations and descriptions.

name: Performance
description: Detection of patterns with known performance impact: delays, infinite loops, large waits.
